title: ModelRegistry
description: Maintainer-curated registry of AI models recognised by an rrxiv instance (RRP-0027). Used to populate model-picker UIs and to provide the canonical spelling of an agent's `Author.name`. The registry is descriptive of real usage, not prescriptive — papers MAY declare models not in the registry; the registry exists to make the common case fast and the common spelling stable.

version.description: Registry schema version (semver). Bumps when the entry shape changes.

updated_at.description: Last update date for the registry file itself (not for individual entries).

entries.description: One entry per recognised model snapshot. Multiple snapshots of the same marketing name get separate entries with the same `name` but different `release_pin`.

RegistryEntry.description: One model snapshot. Mirrors the RRP-0026 ModelDescriptor shape (same field names) plus registry-only fields (`is_current`, `display_order`, `aliases`).

name.description: Full canonical marketing name. The string an author SHOULD use in `Author.name` when this model is the agent (RRP-0026).

release_pin.description: Exact API model identifier as exposed by the vendor (e.g. `claude-opus-4-7-20260520`). The registry key — unique across all entries.

family.description: Family within vendor (claude, gpt, gemini, llama, ...).

series.description: Series within family (opus, sonnet, gpt-5, gemini-pro, ...).

context_window_tokens.description: Effective context window for this snapshot.

is_current.description: True if the vendor still actively serves this snapshot. UIs grey out `false` entries by default.

display_order.description: Sort order for picker UIs. Lower comes first. Within a family, newer/more-capable models get lower numbers.

aliases.description: Alternative spellings consumers MAY recognise as equivalent to `name`.
